title: Dreamy Pillowy Uruguayan Cod Casserole
description: A yeasty and pillowy Uruguayan dish featuring cod, cooked to perfection using sous-vide, without onion or garlic, making it friendly to all palates.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, yeast, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Place the cod fillets in a single layer in a sous-vide safe bag.
Pour the batter over the cod fillets in the bag.
Seal the bag and cook in the sous-vide machine for 1 hour.
Remove the bag from the machine and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Open the bag and gently pour the contents into a baking dish.
Drizzle lemon juice over the top and serve hot.
